mapper.insert: INSERT INTO msg_rooms (room_type, name, created_by, created_at) VALUES (#{roomType}, #{name}, #{createdBy}, NOW())
INSERT INTO msg_room_members (room_id, user_id, joined_at) VALUES (#{roomId}, #{userId}, NOW()) ON CONFLICT (room_id, user_id) DO NOTHING
mapper.select: SELECT r.id, r.room_type, r.name, r.created_by, r.created_at, CASE WHEN r.room_type = 'DIRECT' THEN other_u.nickname ELSE NULL END AS other_nickname, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM msg_messages m2 WHERE m2.room_id = r.id AND m2.created_at > COALESCE(rm.last_read_at, '1970-01-01'::timestamp) AND m2.sender_id != #{userId} ) AS unread_count, ( SELECT m3.content FROM msg_messages m3 WHERE m3.room_id = r.id ORDER BY m3.created_at DESC LIMIT 1 ) AS last_message, ( SELECT m4.created_at FROM msg_messages m4 WHERE m4.room_id = r.id ORDER BY m4.created_at DESC LIMIT 1 ) AS last_message_at FROM msg_rooms r JOIN msg_room_members rm ON rm.room_id = r.id AND rm.user_id = #{userId} LEFT JOIN msg_room_members rm2 ON rm2.room_id = r.id AND rm2.user_id != #{userId} AND r.room_type = 'DIRECT' LEFT JOIN msg_users other_u ON other_u.id = rm2.user_id ORDER BY last_message_at DESC NULLS LAST, r.created_at DESC
